originalTitle: Exorcising demons from neural nets. 1M FPS mini-DoTA/LoL. Dev day #8
title: Debugging Ghost Agents and Adding Observations for Mini MOBA Training
summary: Fixed a critical bug where ghost agents were corrupting training rewards due to passing a grid reference instead of copies, then added observation features including health, mana, level, and hero class. Set up a hyperparameter sweep using Bayesian optimization for stable training.
